canonical_definition: A culture-specific benchmark dataset containing everyday knowledge questions across diverse cultures and languages, with data sourced from authentic, real-world scenarios in native-speaking regions.
papers: Condor: EnhanceLLMAlignment with Knowledge-Driven Data Synthesis and Refinement
Flipping Knowledge Distillation: Leveraging Small Models’ Expertise to EnhanceLLMs in Text Matching
